title: Blocky Shader
description: A performant vanilla-inspired shader for Minecraft Java
body:
# Blocky

Blocky Enhances the Vanilla Style in a Performance Friendly Way

![Terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MVFwE4xD/images/a6260e30297568c38a960bd110489914fcf83862.png)

**Feature include:**
- Shadows
- Colored Shadows
- Distant Horizon Support
- Basic PBR Support (RP Required, Normals and Specular)
- Anti Aliasing (FXAA, From Simon Rodriguez's blog post)
- Height Based Analytical Height Based Fog
- Waving Tree Leaves and Water
- Bloom
- Hardcoded Emmissives
